title: Anyone ever see these I cant find any information on them Theyre unopened
display_title: Anyone ever see these I cant find any information on them Theyre unopened
wikitext:
[]: Anyone ever see these? I can't find any information on them. They're unopened             Quote Post by Roach2791 » Sat May 26, 2018 8:12 pm https://m.imgur.com/TEkbvax I figured I'd try here if Reddit couldn't help me. They did try but, no one's ever seen them.

[]: Re: Anyone ever see these? I can't find any information on them. They're unopened             Quote Post by Roach2791 » Sat May 26, 2018 8:14 pm Furthermore: VHS's marked " For Screening Purpose Only".

[]: Re: Anyone ever see these? I can't find any information on them. They're unopened             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun May 27, 2018 7:48 am Maybe it’s a copy specifically made for conventions or large anime gatherings? Things like that probably would have gained more attention from US anime distributors at around that time. (Manga Ent. released the films in 2001, i think.)

[]: Re: Anyone ever see these? I can't find any information on them. They're unopened             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Sun May 27, 2018 2:14 pm Holy shit dude, you may have hit gold. VHS Evangelion releases are already pretty hard to find, and any US release of End of Eva is super difficult to get your hands on unless you use eBay, but Jesus Christ those are beautiful. No doubt a hidden gem in any collector's eyes, especially since they're clearly official but no one has ever heard of them. I highly, HIGHLY recommend you hold on to them at least. Opening them and seeing if there are any differences between them and retail releases is your call, but I absolutely think you should keep those fuckers near and dear. Think we could get any pictures of the sides, tops, and backs? It would be neat to see if there are any differences in packaging as well. Ideally, you could use a scanner to get a super clear image.

[]: Re: Anyone ever see these? I can't find any information on them. They're unopened             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 27, 2018 7:30 pm Roach2791 wrote: https://m.imgur.com/TEkbvax I figured I'd try here if Reddit couldn't help me. They did try but, no one's ever seen them.

[]: Re: Anyone ever see these? I can't find any information on them. They're unopened             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Sat Jun 16, 2018 1:52 am The Eva Monkey wrote: What more were you looking for?
